faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Lyndhurst?
faqs.answer: Lyndhurst properties most commonly encounter German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, American cockroaches in basements and sewers, and Oriental cockroaches in damp areas. Our treatments are customized based on the specific species infesting your property.
